positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical illustration of mystical astral flora and fauna, floating in deep space. The composition is centered, featuring glowing, luminescent celestial flowers, interwoven with stylized constellations and abstract geometric elements. Use vibrant jewel tones (sapphire, emerald, amethyst) contrasting sharply with deep midnight blue and black voids. The style should be neo-art nouveau combined with fine line etching, giving clean, strong silhouettes and a luxurious, vintage scientific illustration feel. Dramatic volumetric lighting emanates from the flora, creating a deep contrast and highly printable, clear edges, suitable for direct apparel transfer.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, copyright, messy, bad anatomy, cropped, low detail, grain, noise, poor composition
